title: Department Manager Vacancy at KFC India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at KFC India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
